title: Add distributed tracing with OpenTelemetry
description: Implements end-to-end distributed tracing with OpenTelemetry for cross-service request correlation, span context propagation, and Jaeger export.
diff:
diff --git a/observability/tracing.py b/observability/tracing.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..e8f9a0b
--- /dev/null
+++ b/observability/tracing.py
@@ -0,0 +1,30 @@
+from __future__ import annotations
+from opentelemetry import trace
+from opentelemetry.sdk.trace import TracerProvider
+from opentelemetry.sdk.trace.export import BatchSpanProcessor
+from opentelemetry.exporter.jaeger.thrift import JaegerExporter
+from opentelemetry.instrumentation.fastapi import FastAPIInstrumentor
+from opentelemetry.instrumentation.requests import RequestsInstrumentor
+from opentelemetry.instrumentation.sqlalchemy import SQLAlchemyInstrumentor
+
+def setup_tracing(service_name: str, jaeger_host: str = "localhost") -> None:
+    provider = TracerProvider()
+    exporter = JaegerExporter(agent_host_name=jaeger_host, agent_port=6831)
+    provider.add_span_processor(BatchSpanProcessor(exporter))
+    trace.set_tracer_provider(provider)
+
+    FastAPIInstrumentor.instrument()
+    RequestsInstrumentor.instrument()
+    SQLAlchemyInstrumentor().instrument()
+
+def get_tracer(name: str) -> trace.Tracer:
+    return trace.get_tracer(name)
comments: greg: Excellent tracing setup with auto-instrumentation. Approve.
helen: LGTM — context propagation across HTTP and DB is well-configured. Please add tests for span creation.
ivan: Good use of BatchSpanProcessor to avoid performance impact. Approve.
author: jane
